tool.name: Webatlas Build config
tool.command: python "$images_script" && python "$options_script" && /usr/local/bin/build_config.py #if $project: --project '$project' #end if #if $dataset: --dataset '$dataset' #end if --file_paths "[ #for $file in $input_file_paths: '$file.metadata.store_root', #end for ]" --images "\$(cat images.json)" ##TODO: add galaxy url ## --url '$url' --options "\$(cat options.json)" #if $layout: --layout '$layout' #end if #if $custom_layout: --custom_layout '$custom_layout' #end if #if $title: --title '$title' #end if #if $config_filename_suffix: --config_filename_suffix '$config_filename_suffix' #end if && mv $project-$dataset-'$config_filename_suffix'* $output_json

param.name: input_file_paths
param.label: Zarr file(s) generated by 'Webatlas Process files'

param.name: input_image
param.label: Zarr file generated by 'Webatlas Consolidate Metadata'

param.name: input_metadata
param.label: JSON file generated by 'Webatlas OME Zarr Metadata'

param.name: spatial
param.label: Where the Anndata object holds the spatial coordinates

param.name: x_umap
param.label: Comma seperated list of embeddings to use in a scatter plot
param.help: It always plots the first 2 dimensions of the data. E.g. in case of PCA, it plots PC1 vs PC2.

param.name: layout
param.label: Layout
param.help: Type of predefined layout to use. Default value: minimal

param.name: custom_layout
param.label: Custom layout
param.help: String defining a Vitessce layout following its alternative syntax. https://vitessce.github.io/vitessce-python/api_config.html#vitessce.config.VitessceConfig.layout https://github.com/vitessce/vitessce-python/blob/1e100e4f3f6b2389a899552dffe90716ffafc6d5/vitessce/config.py#L855

param.name: title
param.label: Title
param.help: Data title to show in the visualization.

param.name: title
param.value: Visium CytAssist - High resolution mapping of the breast cancer tumor microenvironment

tool.help:
.. class:: infomark
**What it does**
TODO: Fill in help in reStructuredText format (https://docutils.sourceforge.io/docs/ref/rst/restructuredtext.html)
Usage .....
**Input**
**Output**
